title: ayenia corchorifolia
intro: Ayenia corchorifolia, also known as Mexican horse gentian, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ayenia corchorifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health complaints.
